title: The Ceremony Is About to Begin
original_title: The Ceremony Is About to Begin
overview: Madness, mayhem, and mummification rites ensue when a documentary filmmaker visits the rural commune of the Osiris Collective, an ancient Egyptian inspired cult, to investigate the disappearance of his ex-girlfriend.
